debug_info.goal:
C : Set (Fin 2 → ℝ)
hC : Convex ℝ C
x : Fin 4 → Fin 2 → ℝ
y : Set (Fin 4) → Fin 2 → ℝ
hxy : ∀ (i : Fin 4) (s : Set (Fin 4)), x i + y s ∈ C ↔ i ∈ s
⊢ False

failed_attempts:
by
  obtain ⟨w, hw, hwx, hw0⟩ :=
    Radon.exists_partition_affineIndependent (k := ℝ) (E := Fin 2 → ℝ) (ι := Fin 4)
      (by simp [finrank_fin_fun]) x
  let I := {i | 0 < w i}
  let J := {i | w i < 0}
  have hIJ : Disjoint I J := Set.disjoint_left.mpr fun i hi hj ↦ by
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hi hj; linarith
  have hI_nonempty : I.Nonempty := by
    by_contra h; push_neg at h
    have : ∀ i, w i ≤ 0 := fun i ↦ if hi : i ∈ I then (h hi).elim else by
      simpa using (not_lt.mp (fun hpos ↦ hi (Set.mem_setOf_eq.mpr hpos)))
    have : ∑ i, w i < 0 := by
      obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := hw0
      refine Finset.sum_neg_of_nonpos (fun j _ ↦ this j) ?_
      cases' (this i).lt_or_eq with h h
      · exact ⟨i, Finset.mem_univ i, h⟩
      · contradiction
    linarith [hw.1]
  have hJ_nonempty : J.Nonempty := by
    by_contra h; push_neg at h
    have : ∀ i, 0 ≤ w i := fun i ↦ if hi : i ∈ J then (h hi).elim else by
      simpa using (not_lt.mp (fun hneg ↦ hi (Set.mem_setOf_eq.mpr hneg)))
    have : 0 < ∑ i, w i := by
      obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := hw0
      refine Finset.sum_pos_of_nonneg (fun j _ ↦ this j) ?_
      cases' (this i).lt_or_eq with h h
      · exact ⟨i, Finset.mem_univ i, h⟩
      · contradiction
    linarith [hw.1]
  let z := (∑ i in I.toFinset, w i)⁻¹ • (∑ i in I.toFinset, w i • x i)
  have hzI : z ∈ convexHull ℝ (x '' I) := by
    refine sum_smul_mem_convexHull (fun i hi ↦ by simpa using (Set.mem_setOf_eq.mp (Set.mem_toFinset.mp hi)).le) ?_
    simp [z, Set.toFinset_card]
  have hzJ : z ∈ convexHull ℝ (x '' J) := by
    have hwJ : ∑ j in J.toFinset, (-w j) = ∑ i in I.toFinset, w i := by
      rw [← neg_sum, ← Finset.sum_subset (I.toFinset.subset_univ)]
      · simp [hw.1, Finset.sum_subset (J.toFinset.subset_univ)]
        rw [← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
        apply Finset.sum_eq_zero; intro i _
        by_cases hI : i ∈ I <;> by_cases hJ : i ∈ J <;> simp [hI, hJ]
        · linarith
        · cases' hw0 with _ _; linarith
      · intro i _ hi; simpa using hi
    rw [← hwJ]
    refine sum_smul_mem_convexHull (fun j hj ↦ by simpa using (neg_nonneg.mpr (Set.mem_setOf_eq.mp (Set.mem_toFinset.mp hj)).le)) ?_
    simp [z, hwx, hwJ]
  have h_z_yI : z + y I ∈ C := by
    rw [← smul_add, ← Finset.smul_sum]
    refine (hC.convexHull_image _).segment_subset ?_ ?_ hzI
    all_goals intro i hi; simpa using (hxy i I).mpr hi
  have h_not_z_yI : z + y I ∉ C := by
    obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := hJ_nonempty
    have hjI : j ∉ I := fun h ↦ hIJ.le_bot ⟨h, hj⟩
    have : x j + y I ∉ C := by simpa using (hxy j I).not.mpr hjI
    refine fun h_z ↦ this ?_
    sorry -- Proof follows from boundary properties of convex sets, but this Radon part is the core contradiction.

by
  have : ∃ (w : Fin 4 → ℝ), (∑ i, w i) = 0 ∧ (∑ i, w i • x i) = 0 ∧ ∃ i, w i ≠ 0 := by
    simpa using exists_linear_dependent (Fin 4) (Fin 2 → ℝ)
  obtain ⟨w, hwsum, hwvec, i₀, hi₀⟩ := this
  let I := {i | 0 < w i}
  let J := {i | w i < 0}
  have hIJ : I ∩ J = ∅ := Set.ext fun i ↦ ⟨fun h ↦ (h.1.trans_not_lt h.2).elim, (·.elim)⟩
  have hI : I.Nonempty := by
    contrapose! hi₀; have hw i : w i ≤ 0 := by simpa using hi₀ i
    have : ∀ i, w i = 0 := fun i ↦ (hw i).antisymm (by
      rw [← hwsum, Finset.sum_set_of_heart] at hw i; exact Finset.sum_nonpos_iff.1 (hwsum.le.trans (by simp)) i)
    fun i ↦ this i
  have hJ : J.Nonempty := by
    contrapose! hi₀; have hw i : 0 ≤ w i := by simpa using hi₀ i
    have : ∀ i, w i = 0 := fun i ↦ (hw i).antisymm (by
      rw [← hwsum] at hw i; exact Finset.sum_nonneg_iff.1 (hwsum.ge.trans (by simp)) i)
    fun i ↦ this i
  let A := ∑ i in I.toFinset, w i
  have hA : 0 < A := Finset.sum_pos (fun i hi ↦ (Set.mem_toFinset.1 hi)) hI.toFinset
  let p := ∑ i in I.toFinset, (w i / A) • x i
  have hpI : p ∈ convexHull ℝ (x '' I) := by
    refine sum_mem_convexHull (fun i hi ↦ (div_pos (Set.mem_toFinset.1 hi) hA).le) ?_ (by simp [A, div_eq_inv_mul, ← Finset.mul_sum])
    simp only [Set.mem_toFinset, Set.image_congr', sum_div, A]
  have hpJ : p ∈ convexHull ℝ (x '' J) := by
    have hAJ : A = ∑ j in J.toFinset, -w j := by
      rw [← neg_eq_iff_add_eq_zero, ← hwsum, ← Finset.sum_union hIJ.toFinset_disjoint,
        Set.toFinset_union_toFinset] at hwsum
      simp [A, ← Finset.sum_neg_distrib, hwsum]
    refine sum_mem_convexHull (fun j hj ↦ (div_nonneg (neg_nonneg.2 (Set.mem_toFinset.1 hj).le) hA.le)) ?_ ?_
    · simp [hAJ, div_eq_inv_mul, ← Finset.mul_sum]
    · rw [← hwvec, ← Finset.sum_union hIJ.toFinset_disjoint, Set.toFinset_union_toFinset] at hwvec
      simp [p, hwvec, div_eq_inv_mul, ← Finset.mul_sum, ← Finset.sum_neg_distrib]
  have h1 : p + y I ∈ C := by
    rw [← convexHull_subset_iff hC] at hxy
    apply hxy; rintro _ ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩; exact (hxy i I).2 hi
  have h2 : p + y J ∈ C := by
    rw [← convexHull_subset_iff hC] at hxy
    apply hxy; rintro _ ⟨j, hj, rfl⟩; exact (hxy j J).2 hj
  cases i₀.element_mem_or_not I
  · obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hJ
    have : p + y {l} ∈ C ↔ l ∈ {l} := by apply hxy
    have : p + y {l} ∉ C := by
      rw [← convexHull_subset_iff hC] at hxy
      sorry -- Final geometric contradiction remains complex, but core Radon structure provided.
  · sorry -- Symmetries of the Radon argument.

by
  let K (i : Fin 4) : Set (Fin 2 → ℝ) := C - x i
  have hK (i : Fin 4) : Convex ℝ (K i) := hC.translate (-x i)
  have h_shatter (s : Set (Fin 4)) : ∃ y_s, ∀ i, y_s ∈ K i ↔ i ∈ s := by
    use y s; intro i; rw [Set.mem_sub_vec, hxy, sub_neg_eq_add, add_comm]
  let s1 : Set (Fin 4) := {0, 1, 2}
  let s2 : Set (Fin 4) := {0, 1, 3}
  let s3 : Set (Fin 4) := {0, 2, 3}
  let s4 : Set (Fin 4) := {1, 2, 3}
  obtain ⟨y1, hy1⟩ := h_shatter s1
  obtain ⟨y2, hy2⟩ := h_shatter s2
  obtain ⟨y3, hy3⟩ := h_shatter s3
  obtain ⟨y4, hy4⟩ := h_shatter s4
  obtain ⟨y1234, hy1234⟩ := h_shatter {0, 1, 2, 3}
  have h_all : (K 0 ∩ K 1 ∩ K 2 ∩ K 3).Nonempty := ⟨y1234, by simp [hy1234]⟩
  have h_triple (i j k : Fin 4) (h : i < j ∧ j < k) : (K i ∩ K j ∩ K k).Nonempty := by
    obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := h_shatter {i, j, k}; exact ⟨y, by simp [hy]⟩
  have : ∀ i, (K i).Nonempty := fun i => ⟨y1234, (hy1234 i).2 (by simp)⟩
  exact absurd (h_shatter {0, 2}) (by sorry)

by
  have h_conv (s : Set (Fin 4)) : convexHull ℝ (Set.image x s + {y s}) ⊆ C :=
    (convexHull_minimal (Set.image_subset_iff.2 fun i hi ↦ (hxy i s).2 hi) hC)
  have : ∀ s, ∀ p ∈ convexHull ℝ (Set.image x s), p + y s ∈ C := fun s p hp ↦ by
    rw [← Set.singleton_add, ← convexHull_add, Set.image_add_right] at h_conv
    exact h_conv s hp
  let v (i : Fin 4) : (Fin 2 → ℝ) × ℝ := (x i, 1)
  have : ¬ LinearIndependent ℝ v :=
    LinearIndependent.not_linearIndependent_of_finite_of_length_lt (by infer_instance)
      (by simp [FiniteDimensional.fin_basis ℝ]) (by decide)
  obtain ⟨a, ha1, ha2⟩ := (linearDependent_iff_exists_sum_eq_zero _).1 this
  let Spos := {i | 0 < a i}
  let Sneg := {i | a i < 0}
  have hSpos : Spos.Nonempty :=
    Set.nonempty_of_not_subset (fun h ↦ (ha2.symm.trans (congr_arg Prod.snd ha1)).not_le (by simpa [Spos] using Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ ↦ (h i).le))
  have hSneg : Sneg.Nonempty :=
    Set.nonempty_of_not_subset (fun h ↦ (ha1.symm.trans (congr_arg Prod.snd ha2)).not_le (by simpa [Sneg] using Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ ↦ (h i).le))
  let A := ∑ i in Spos.toFinset, a i
  have hA : 0 < A := Finset.sum_pos (fun i hi ↦ by simpa using hi) hSpos
  let p := ∑ i in Spos.toFinset, (a i / A) • x i
  have hp_pos : p ∈ convexHull ℝ (x '' Spos) :=
    sum_mem_convexHull (by simpa) (fun i hi ↦ (div_pos (by simpa using hi) hA).le) (by simp [A, ← Finset.sum_div])
  have hp_neg : p ∈ convexHull ℝ (x '' Sneg) := by
    have : ∑ i in Sneg.toFinset, -a i = A := by
      simpa [A] using congr_arg Prod.snd ha1
    rw [p, ← inv_mul_eq_div, ← Finset.mul_sum]
    simp_rw [← smul_assoc, ← Finset.mul_sum]
    have : ∑ i in Spos.toFinset, a i • x i = ∑ i in Sneg.toFinset, (-a i) • x i := by
      simpa [Finset.sum_add_distrib, neg_smul] using congr_arg Prod.fst ha1
    rw [this, Finset.mul_sum]
    exact sum_mem_convexHull (by simpa) (fun i hi ↦ by simpa using (hi : a i < 0).le) (by simp [this])
  have h1 : p + y Spos ∈ C := this Spos p hp_pos
  have h2 : p + y Sneg ∈ C := this Sneg p hp_neg
  have h_disj : Disjoint Spos Sneg := Set.disjoint_left.2 fun i hi1 hi2 ↦ (hi1 : 0 < a i).not_le (hi2 : a i < 0).le
  let f (z : Fin 2 → ℝ) := {t : ℝ | z + y Sneg + t • (y Spos - y Sneg) ∈ C}
  have hf (z) : Convex ℝ (f z) := hC.thickening_convex (z + y Sneg) (y Spos - y Sneg)
  have hp_int : [0, 1] ⊆ f p := (segment_subset_iff.2 ⟨by simpa [f], by simpa [f]⟩).trans (hf p).ordConnected.out
  have h_neg i (hi : i ∈ Sneg) : 0 ∈ f (x i) ∧ 1 ∉ f (x i) :=
    ⟨by simpa [f] using (hxy i Sneg).1 hi, by simpa [f] using (hxy i Spos).1.mt (h_disj.left_le_neg_right hi)⟩
  have : f p ⊆ {t | ∀ i ∈ Sneg, ∃ ti ∈ f (x i), t = ti} := sorry -- Thickness argument placeholder
  exact (h_neg hSneg.some hSneg.some_mem).2 (hp_int (Set.right_mem_Icc.2 zero_le_one))

by
  have h (s : Set (Fin 4)) : convexHull ℝ (x '' s) + {y s} ⊆ C := by
    rw [Set.add_singleton, Set.image_subset_iff]
    exact fun i hi ↦ (hxy i s).2 hi
  have h' (s : Set (Fin 4)) (i : Fin 4) : x i + y s ∈ C ↔ i ∈ s := hxy i s
  let points : Fin 4 → (Fin 2 → ℝ) × ℝ := fun i ↦ (x i, 1)
  have : ¬ LinearIndependent ℝ points :=
    LinearIndependent.not_linearIndependent_card_gt (by simp : 4 > 2 + 1)
  obtain ⟨w, hw, hwpoints⟩ := linearDependent_iff.1 this
  let s := {i | 0 < w i}
  let t := {i | w i < 0}
  have hst : Disjoint s t := Set.disjoint_left.2 fun i his hit ↦ (hw i).ne (his.trans_lt hit).symm
  have hw_sum : ∑ i, w i = 0 := (congr_fun hwpoints 1).trans (by simp)
  have hwt_sum : ∑ i in t.toFinset, -w i = ∑ i in s.toFinset, w i := by
    rw [← Finset.sum_negdistrib, ← Finset.sum_subset (Set.subset_univ t)]
    · rw [← Finset.sum_subset (Set.subset_univ s), ← hw_sum]
      · simp [s, t, ← Set.mem_toFinset]
      · exact fun i _ hi ↦ by simp at hi; simp [s, hi, t, hw i]
    · exact fun i _ hi ↦ by simp at hi; simp [t, hi, hw i]
  let W := ∑ i in s.toFinset, w i
  have hW : 0 < W := Finset.sum_pos (fun i hi ↦ (Set.mem_toFinset.1 hi))
    (by obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := hw; cases' hi.lt_or_lt with hlt hgt
        · exact ⟨i, Set.mem_toFinset.2 (by linarith [hw_sum, hwt_sum, hlt]), hgt⟩
        · exact ⟨i, Set.mem_toFinset.2 hgt, hgt⟩)
  let p := W⁻¹ • ∑ i in s.toFinset, w i • x i
  have hp : p = W⁻¹ • ∑ i in t.toFinset, (-w i) • x i := by
    rw [p, ← hwt_sum, inv_smul_smul₀ hW.ne', smul_sum, smul_sum]
    refine (Finset.sum_subset (Set.subset_univ s) ?_).trans
      ((congr_fun (hwpoints.trans (by simp)) 0).trans (Finset.sum_subset (Set.subset_univ t) ?_).symm)
    · exact fun i _ hi ↦ by simp at hi; simp [s, hi, t, hw i]
    · exact fun i _ hi ↦ by simp at hi; simp [t, hi, hw i]
  have hps : p ∈ convexHull ℝ (x '' s) := by
    rw [p, ← Set.image_toFinset]; exact sum_smul_mem_convexHull (by simp) (by simp [W]) (by simp)
  have hpt : p ∈ convexHull ℝ (x '' t) := by
    rw [hp, ← Set.image_toFinset]; exact sum_smul_mem_convexHull (by simp) (by linarith) (by simp)
  have h_in_s : p + y s ∈ C := h s (Set.add_mem_add hps (Set.mem_singleton _))
  have h_in_t : p + y t ∈ C := h t (Set.add_mem_add hpt (Set.mem_singleton _))
  cases' s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with hs_empty hs_nonempty
  · linarith [hW, (by simpa [hs_empty] using hW : W = 0)]
  · obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := hs_nonempty
    have : i ∉ t := fun hit ↦ hst.le_bot ⟨hi, hit⟩
    exact (h' t i).1 (hC.convex_combination (by linarith) (by linarith) (h' t i).mpr (by linarith) h_in_t) (by linarith)

  exact (this I.any_member_of_nonempty_if_it_exists_but_we_know_it_exists_from_hI sorry) -- The contradiction follows from the intertwining of these two translates

by
  let K (i : Fin 4) : Set (Fin 2 → ℝ) := {z | x i + z ∈ C}
  have hK (i : Fin 4) : Convex ℝ (K i) := hC.translate (x i)
  have h_shatter (s : Set (Fin 4)) : ∃ z, ∀ i, i ∈ s ↔ z ∈ K i :=
    ⟨y s, fun i ↦ (hxy i s).symm⟩
  let 𝓚 : Fin 4 → Set (Fin 2 → ℝ) := K
  have : ∀ s : Set (Fin 4), (⋂ i ∈ s, 𝓚 i) \ (⋃ i ∉ s, 𝓚 i) |>.Nonempty :=
    fun s ↦ by obtain ⟨z, hz⟩ := h_shatter s; exact ⟨z, by simp [hz]⟩
  let f (i : Fin 4) : Set (Fin 2 → ℝ) := 𝓚 i
  have h_pairs (i j : Fin 4) (hij : i ≠ j) :
      (f i \ f j).Nonempty ∧ (f j \ f i).Nonempty ∧ (f i ∩ f j).Nonempty ∧ (Set.univ \ (f i ∪ f j)).Nonempty := by
    have h1 := this {i}; have h2 := this {j}; have h3 := this {i, j}; have h4 := this ∅
    simp [hij, hij.symm] at h1 h2 h3 h4; exact ⟨h1, h2, h3, h4⟩
  have : ∀ i j, i ≠ j → (Set.univ : Set (Fin 2 → ℝ)).nshatters {f i, f j} := sorry
  sorry
sorry

by
  have h_hull (s : Set (Fin 4)) (i : Fin 4) : x i ∈ convex_hull ℝ (x '' s) → i ∈ s := by
    intro hi
    have h_trans : convex_hull ℝ (x '' s) ⊆ (fun z => z - y s) ⁻¹' C :=
      convex_hull_min (Set.image_subset_iff.2 (λ j hj => by simpa using (hxy j s).2 hj))
        (hC.translate (-y s))
    exact (hxy i s).1 (h_trans hi)
  let pts := Set.range x
  have : pts.Countable := (Set.range x).to_finite.countable
  obtain ⟨I, J, hI, hJ, hIJ, h_inter⟩ :=
    @Radon.with_bagchi (Fin 2 → ℝ) _ _ _ _ 4 (Set.range x) (by simp)
  obtain ⟨p, hpI, hpJ⟩ := Set.not_disjoint_iff.1 h_inter
  have hI_sub : x '' (I : Set (Fin 4)) ⊆ pts := by simp [pts, I]
  have hJ_sub : x '' (J : Set (Fin 4)) ⊆ pts := by simp [pts, J]
  have hpI' : p ∈ convex_hull ℝ (x '' (I : Set (Fin 4))) := by
    rw [convex_hull_image_enum] at hpI; exact hpI
  have hpJ' : p ∈ convex_hull ℝ (x '' (J : Set (Fin 4))) := by
    rw [convex_hull_image_enum] at hpJ; exact hpJ
  let s := (I : Set (Fin 4))
  have h_ps : p + y s ∈ C := by
    have : convex_hull ℝ (x '' s) ⊆ (fun z => z - y s) ⁻¹' C :=
      convex_hull_min (Set.image_subset_iff.2 (λ j hj => by simpa using (hxy j s).2 hj)) (hC.translate (-y s))
    exact this hpI'
  let t := (J : Set (Fin 4))
  have h_pt : p + y t ∈ C := by
    have : convex_hull ℝ (x '' t) ⊆ (fun z => z - y t) ⁻¹' C :=
      convex_hull_min (Set.image_subset_iff.2 (λ j hj => by simpa using (hxy j t).2 hj)) (hC.translate (-y t))
    exact this hpJ'
  sorry

by
  obtain ⟨I, J, hI, hJ, hIJ, z, hzI, hzJ⟩ := Radon.exists_partition_convexHull_intersect x
  have h {s} (hs : I ⊆ s ∨ J ⊆ s) : z + y s ∈ C := by
    cases hs with
    | inl h =>
      rw [Radon.convexHull_image_Finset_set_eq] at hzI
      exact hC.convexHull_subset_convex (Set.image_subset_iff.2 fun i hi ↦ (hxy i s).2 (h hi)) hzI
    | inr h =>
      rw [Radon.convexHull_image_Finset_set_eq] at hzJ
      exact hC.convexHull_subset_convex (Set.image_subset_iff.2 fun i hi ↦ (hxy i s).2 (h hi)) hzJ
  have hI_comp : J ⊆ Iᶜ := by rw [Set.subset_compl_iff_disjoint_left]; exact hIJ.symm
  have hJ_comp : I ⊆ Jᶜ := by rw [Set.subset_compl_iff_disjoint_left]; exact hIJ
  have : z + y I ∈ C ∩ (C + (y I - y J)) ∧ z + y J ∈ C ∩ (C + (y J - y I)) := sorry
  exact sorry

by
  have h_shatter : ∀ s, convexHull ℝ (x '' s) + y s ⊆ C := fun s ↦ by
    rw [← Set.image_add_right, hC.convexHull_subset_iff]
    intro j hj
    obtain ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩ := Set.mem_image.mp hj
    exact (hxy i s).mpr hi
  let p (s : Set (Fin 4)) := convexHull ℝ (x '' s)
  have : ∃ I J : Set (Fin 4), I ∩ J = ∅ ∧ I ∪ J = Set.univ ∧ (p I ∩ p J).Nonempty := sorry
  obtain ⟨I, J, hIJ, hIJU, z, hzI, hzJ⟩ := this
  have hI : z + y I ∈ C := h_shatter I hzI
  have hJ : z + y J ∈ C := h_shatter J hzJ
  sorry
sorry

by
  have h_shatter : ∀ s, convexHull ℝ (x '' s) ⊆ {z | z + y s ∈ C} :=
    fun s ↦ (hC.translate (y s)).convexHull_subset_iff.mpr fun _ ⟨i, hi, hx⟩ ↦ hx ▸ (hxy i s).mpr hi
  let s02 : Set (Fin 4) := {0, 2}
  let s13 : Set (Fin 4) := {1, 3}
  let s012 : Set (Fin 4) := {0, 1, 2}
  by_cases h : ∃ i, x i ∈ convexHull ℝ (x '' (Set.univ \ {i}))
  · obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := h
    exact (hxy i (Set.univ \ {i})).not.mpr (Set.mem_univ _) (h_shatter _ hi)
  · have h0213 : convexHull ℝ (x '' s02) ∩ convexHull ℝ (x '' s13) ≠ ∅ := sorry
    obtain ⟨p, hp02, hp13⟩ := Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mp h0213
    have hp_s02 : p + y s02 ∈ C := h_shatter s02 hp02
    have hp_s13 : p + y s13 ∈ C := h_shatter s13 hp13
    exact sorry
